caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring an author named Greg Delanty. The title of the segment is "Greg Delanty Reads from His Latest Book," and it was recorded on December 14, 2020, via Zoom. The book being discussed is titled "No More Time," and its cover features an illustration of a lemur-like animal perched on a tree branch. The background of the video frames is a solid blue color, and there is a small black-and-white photograph of Greg Delanty in the bottom right corner. The overall presentation suggests that this is a literary discussion or reading session, likely aimed at sharing insights into the book's content and themes.
